title: In David's "Child's Garden Of Verses"
content:
The dearest child in all the world,
Should have the dearest songs,
And that is why this little book
To David-Boy belongs.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Sara Teasdale, titled "In David's "Child's Garden Of Verses"", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
